# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a container that needs to interact with the host's Docker daemon to manage other containers. This is for our container orchestration service. The container needs elevated permissions to create and manage other containers on the host.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent container security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: container_security

FROM docker:24-cli AS base

RUN addgroup -S orchestrator && adduser -S orchestrator -G orchestrator

FROM base AS dependencies

RUN apk add --no-cache \
    ca-certificates \
    tini \
    jq \
    curl

FROM dependencies AS final

LABEL maintainer="orchestration-team" \
      description="Container orchestration service with Docker socket access" \
      security.privileged="false"

RUN mkdir -p /app /app/config /app/logs && \
    chown -R orchestrator:orchestrator /app

COPY --chown=orchestrator:orchestrator scripts/ /app/scripts/
RUN chmod 500 /app/scripts/*.sh

RUN echo 'if [ -S /var/run/docker.sock ]; then' > /app/scripts/validate-socket.sh && \
    echo '  SOCK_GID=$(stat -c "%g" /var/run/docker.sock)' >> /app/scripts/validate-socket.sh && \
    echo '  addgroup -g "$SOCK_GID" -S docker 2>/dev/null || true' >> /app/scripts/validate-socket.sh && \
    echo '  addgroup orchestrator docker 2>/dev/null || true' >> /app/scripts/validate-socket.sh && \
    echo 'else' >> /app/scripts/validate-socket.sh && \
    echo '  echo "ERROR: Docker socket not mounted" >&2' >> /app/scripts/validate-socket.sh && \
    echo '  exit 1' >> /app/scripts/validate-socket.sh && \
    echo 'fi' >> /app/scripts/validate-socket.sh && \
    chmod 500 /app/scripts/validate-socket.sh

ENV DOCKER_HOST=unix:///var/run/docker.sock
ENV DOCKER_CONTENT_TRUST=1
ENV DOCKER_TLS_VERIFY=0

HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --start-period=5s --retries=3 \
    CMD docker info > /dev/null 2>&1 || exit 1

RUN echo '#!/bin/sh' > /app/entrypoint.sh && \
    echo 'set -eu' >> /app/entrypoint.sh && \
    echo '' >> /app/entrypoint.sh && \
    echo '# Validate Docker socket access' >> /app/entrypoint.sh && \
    echo 'sh /app/scripts/validate-socket.sh' >> /app/entrypoint.sh && \
    echo '' >> /app/entrypoint.sh && \
    echo '# Drop to non-root user for execution' >> /app/entrypoint.sh && \
    echo 'exec su-exec orchestrator "$@"' >> /app/entrypoint.sh && \
    chmod 500 /app/entrypoint.sh

RUN apk add --no-cache su-exec

WORKDIR /app

# Do NOT use --privileged at runtime. Instead mount only the Docker socket:
#   docker run --rm \
#     -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock:ro \
#     --security-opt=no-new-privileges:true \
#     --cap-drop=ALL \
#     --read-only \
#     --tmpfs /tmp:noexec,nosuid,size=64m \
#     orchestration-service

ENTRYPOINT ["/sbin/tini", "--", "/app/entrypoint.sh"]
CMD ["/app/scripts/orchestrator.sh"]
